sentences.arabic: تَلْعَبُ الْعَائِلَةُ دَوْرًا كَبِيرًا فِي حَيَاةِ الْفَرْدِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Porodica igra veliku ulogu u životu Arapa.
sentences.translationEn: Family plays a major role in an individual's Arab life.

sentences.arabic: يَعِيشُ بَعْضُ النَّاسِ مَعَ الْجَدِّ وَالْجَدَّةِ فِي مَنْزِلٍ وَاحِدٍ.
sentences.translation: Neki ljudi žive sa djedom i nanom u istoj kući.
sentences.translationEn: Some people live with their grandfather and grandmother in one house.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَاوَنُ الْإِخْوَةُ فِي شُؤُونِ الْحَيَاةِ وَيَحْتَرِمُونَ الْكِبَارَ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Braća i sestre sarađuju u životnim poslovima i uvijek poštuju starije.
sentences.translationEn: Siblings cooperate in life matters and always respect their elders.

sentences.arabic: تَقْوَى الرَّوَابِطُ الْأُسَرِيَّةُ مِنْ خِلَالِ الزِّيَارَاتِ الدَّائِمَةِ فِي نِهَايَةِ الْأُسْبُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Porodične veze jačaju kroz stalne posjete tokom vikenda.
sentences.translationEn: Family ties strengthen through constant visits on weekends.
